name: ALKF+
message: Li Jingxun and Lei Huanting Architects is an innovative and diverse architectural company that was founded in 1962 and became a limited company in 1998. The company has experienced and professional design team consisting of six directors, six assistant directors, technical managers, and over 200 technical staff. The company has extensive experience in design and construction in infrastructure, hospitals, schools, commercial, retail, residential, hotels, and industrial fields.
